case_title: ALLIANCE UNITED INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SAMMIE JUNE NATHAN ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-18-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
